Subject: Request for Brief Extension — Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a one-week extension of our current deadline for the contract review. The additional time would allow us to complete a thorough review and ensure our response is both comprehensive and considered.

Please let me know if this adjustment works on your end, or if you'd like to discuss alternative arrangements. Thank you for your understanding, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Request for Brief Extension — Contract Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to respectfully request a one-week extension of our current deadline for the contract review. The additional time would allow us to complete a thorough review and ensure our response is both comprehensive and considered.

Please let me know if this adjustment works on your end, or if you'd like to discuss alternative arrangements. Thank you for your understanding, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
